items.html: Thus there are two doors and two hinges, and two kinds of MAN [Mayin Nukvin, female waters]. While half of them are corrected in her — one door, one hinge, and one MAN — she is still called Naar. And when the second door, the second hinge, and the second MAN are given to her, she is then called Naarah. Therefore we must first clarify this whole matter mentioned; through it their reality — how they are — will be understood, and their time, when it is, will also be understood; and then you will understand the time she is called Naar and the time she is called Naarah.
